query: default.filter(((((((nucleotideEquals(position:=300, symbol:='G', sequenceName:='main')) && ((nucleotideEquals(position:=400, symbol:='-', sequenceName:='main')) || (nucleotideEquals(position:=500, symbol:='B', sequenceName:='main')))) && (!(nucleotideEquals(position:=600, symbol:='-', sequenceName:='main')))) && (maybe((nucleotideEquals(position:=700, symbol:='B', sequenceName:='main')) || (nucleotideEquals(position:=800, symbol:='-', sequenceName:='main'))))) && (nOf(3, {nucleotideEquals(position:=123, symbol:='A', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=234, symbol:='T', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=345, symbol:='G', sequenceName:='main')}))) && (pango_lineage.lineage('B', includeSublineages:=true)))).groupBy({count:=count()})
